title: Vanity Makeup Mirror with Natural Bamboo Stand, 8 Inch 1X/3X Tabletop Makeup Mirror (White-oval)
features: 【3X Magnification】 The size of our White-oval mirror is 20.5cm*18cm*4.5cm, and the size of our white-oval mirror is 19.8cm*18cm*4.5cm, large mirror surface. This make up mirror is double sided with 1X/3X magnification. It can zoom in your facial detail and bring you a clear vision of your makeup look.
【360° Rotation 】With 360°free rotation design, this 3X magnifying makeup mirror is easy for you to swivel and adjust the angle. You can easily select the best angle and position to make up.
【High clear mirror】This mirror is made of high definition glass with high refractive index, clear and bright image without deformation. Easy to clean.
【Stable base】The thick bamboo and wood standing bracket is stable and not easy to fall. It is suitable to be placed on the table or held by hand.
